label: Governed License Authority Profile
description: TSMM-native profile for authorities that issue governed licenses into an ecosystem.

nodes.label: Governed license authority domain
nodes.description: Domain for legitimate issuance of operating or participation licenses.

nodes.label: License authority
nodes.description: Authority that claims the right to issue governed licenses.

nodes.label: License registry
nodes.description: Registry where license status and scope are published.

nodes.label: License issuance policy
nodes.description: Policy defining scope, legitimacy proof, and appeal conditions.

nodes.label: Governed license credential
nodes.description: Credential issued to an ecosystem participant.

nodes.label: Legitimacy proof bundle
nodes.description: Evidence that the authority is entitled to issue licenses.

nodes.label: Issuance decision
nodes.description: Decision to issue, deny, or revoke a governed license.

nodes.label: Participation effect
nodes.description: Allows or withdraws participation based on the license state.

edges.description: Authority operates or anchors the registry surface.
Issuance policy constrains the license credential.
Decision issues or withholds the governed license.
